retrieved_result: 3 Ways to Treat Diarrhea \"Staying hydrated, eating bland foods, and even over-the-counter medication can help with diarrhea symptoms. Jack Anderson/Getty Images; i Stock.com (2)Key Takeaways In most cases, diarrhea will resolve itself within a few days of starting. Clear fluids and sports drinks can help limit dehydration.\"
